ted_talk.title: The best stats you've ever seen
ted_talk.speaker: Hans Rosling

chart_spec.color_grouping: Continent or equivalent broad world region

highlighted_relationships: United States should be far to the right with high life expectancy.
China should sit to the right of India and above India on life expectancy.
Nigeria should have the lowest life expectancy among the highlighted countries.
Brazil should be to the right of China on GDP per capita and slightly above China on life expectancy.
China and India should be the two largest highlighted bubbles by population.
